name: Hermetic vessel (vas hermeticum): the sealed flask of alchemical transformation, where the prima materia undergoes nigredo, albedo, citrinitas, and rubedo. FSPLIT: the sealed vessel splits the prima materia into volatile (spirit that rises) and fixed (body that remains). FFUSE: circulation reunites the volatile and fixed as the Stone. VINIT: empty vessel. TANCH: the hermetic seal. AFWD: sublimation (ascent). AREV: condensation (descent). ENGAGR: the ouroboros stage — the serpent eating its tail where beginning and end are simultaneous.

phase_0.domain_name: Hermetic vessel (vas hermeticum): the sealed flask of alchemical transformation, where the prima materia undergoes nigredo, albedo, citrinitas, and rubedo. FSPLIT: the sealed vessel splits the prima materia into volatile (spirit that rises) and fixed (body that remains). FFUSE: circulation reunites the volatile and fixed as the Stone. VINIT: empty vessel. TANCH: the hermetic seal. AFWD: sublimation (ascent). AREV: condensation (descent). ENGAGR: the ouroboros stage — the serpent eating its tail where beginning and end are simultaneous.
phase_0.boundary_condition: the hermetic seal (TANCH) that closes the vessel and prevents escape

VINIT.justification: the unsealed, uncharged flask before any prima materia is introduced

TANCH.justification: the closed boundary that contains the entire alchemical system

AFWD.justification: forward morphism: volatile spirit rises from the matter

AREV.justification: reverse morphism: spirit returns to the fixed body

CLINK.justification: sequential chaining of sublimation and condensation cycles

IMSCRIB.justification: self-recognition: the completed Stone knows itself as the goal

FSPLIT.justification: the sealed vessel splits the prima materia into volatile (spirit) and fixed (body)

FFUSE.justification: circulation reunites the separated parts into the Stone

EVALT.justification: affirmative: the Stone is achieved, the work is complete

ENGAGR.justification: paradox: beginning and end are simultaneous, the cycle is self-referential

IFIX.justification: permanent irreversible record: once achieved, the Stone cannot be unmade

phase_3.void_description: empty vessel before any prima materia
phase_3.both_description: ouroboros — the serpent eating its tail, beginning and end simultaneous

steps.domain_action: Step 1 IMSCRIB: the vessel recognizes itself as a sealed container
Step 2 AREV: the prima materia descends into putrefaction (nigredo)
Step 3 FSPLIT: the matter splits into volatile spirit and fixed body
Step 4 AFWD: the spirit ascends through sublimation
Step 5 FFUSE: the spirit and body reunite in coniunctio
Step 6 CLINK: the circulation cycle is linked repeatedly
Step 7 IFIX: the Stone is fixed permanently
Step 8 IMSCRIB: the Stone recognizes itself as the completed work

phase_5.compiler_frontend: the alchemist's intention and the furnace heat
phase_5.memory_mechanism: the sealed vessel retains all matter and spirit
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: the sequence of nigredo, albedo, citrinitas, rubedo

phase_6.pre_cycle_state: prima materia in the sealed vessel
phase_6.post_cycle_state: the Stone in the sealed vessel
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — the cycle is closed and reversible in principle; the vessel is sealed, no matter escapes
